title: Create:structures
description: Adds some Create-themed structures— that naturally generate in the overworld, bringing industrial-style world-building and exploration to your Create-based modpack.
body:
Create: Structures
Description:
This addon introduces some fully detailed, Create-themed rstructures to your Minecraft world: featuring mechanical decorations, storage areas, platforms, and workshop-like details.

These structures naturally generate across the overworld, adding immersive world-building and new exploration spots for players who enjoy Create’s aesthetic. Whether you're building a transportation network or expanding your world with industrial landmarks, these stations blend seamlessly into any Create-focused modpacks

Features:

Naturally generated railway stations across overworld biomes

Detailed interiors with barrels, crates, machinery props, and utility areas

Perfect for Create-based worlds and transportation builds

Lightweight and fully compatible with world generation mods

Built with MCreator’s structure tools

Requirements:
This addon requires the following mods:

Create

Create: Easy Structures

Create: Encased

Create: Deco

Create bit`s and bobs

Compatibility:

Minecraft: 1.20.1 1.21.1

Mod Loader: Forge Neoforge

The Create: structures Team
